<!-- One or two sentences: the problem and the change. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `just lint` and `just test` pass locally
- [ ] `just check-typegen` passes (schema.d.ts regenerated and committed if
      the API changed)
- [ ] Migrations are new files only (none edited or renamed)
- [ ] README / AGENTS.md updated if conventions changed
- [ ] No license-encumbered code or third-party product names
- [ ] Conventional commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `ci:`, `docs:`, `test:`)
